backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing a project estimation system with CRUD operations for project types (website, mobile app, AI integration, ecommerce, automation) and cost calculations stored in maps.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend React/TypeScript components describing their functionality, styling, and type fixes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI elements like backgrounds, borders, and charts.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that loads the React application via main.tsx into a root div element.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that assembles all page sections with animated background, particle effects, navigation, and footer in a layered layout.
frontend/src/components/AboutFounder.tsx: Founder profile section with photo, bio, title, and inspirational quote in a glassmorphism card with scroll-triggered animation.
frontend/src/components/AISphereTHREE.ts: React Three Fiber component rendering an animated 3D distorted sphere with particle field and colored lighting effects, with fallback image during loading.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedBackgrou: Canvas-based animated grid background with moving vertical and horizontal lines overlaid on a static AI grid image.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedConnecti: Canvas component drawing animated connection lines and pulsing nodes in a grid pattern for technology stack visualization.
frontend/src/components/BrandMessage.tsx: Glassmorphism panel displaying company tagline and mission statement with gradient text styling.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact form component with email, phone, and location information display, handling form submission with simulated async behavior and scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying company branding, quick navigation links, social media icons, and copyright information with a "Made with Love" message.
frontend/src/components/GlobalVision.tsx: Vision section showcasing company goals with animated icons and statistics cards displaying projects delivered, clients, and support availability.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero landing section with main headline, CTA buttons for contact/consultation/WhatsApp, and a 3D AI sphere visualization component.
frontend/src/components/MockupCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying project mockup images with loading states, hover effects, and scroll-triggered animations for desktop or mobile layouts.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation header with smooth scroll links, mobile hamburger menu, and glass-morphism styling that changes on scroll.
frontend/src/components/ParticleField.ts: Canvas-based animated particle background with moving dots and connecting lines, creating a dynamic network visualization effect.
frontend/src/components/PricingCard.tsx: Pricing tier card component displaying plan name, price, feature list with checkmarks, and a CTA button with optional "popular" badge styling.
frontend/src/components/PricingSection.t: Displays a pricing section with four tiers (Starter, Business Pro, AI Powered, Mobile App + AI) using scroll animations and PricingCard components.
Renders a grid of product mockups (trading dashboard, chatbot, SaaS panel, mobile app, automation flow) using MockupCard components with scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCalculato: Interactive calculator component with checkboxes for project features (website, mobile app, AI, e-commerce, automation) that calls backend to estimate project cost.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Reusable card component displaying a service with an icon, title, and description, featuring hover effects and scroll-triggered animations.
Section component that displays six service offerings (AI website, Android/iOS apps, SaaS, automation, e-commerce) using ServiceCard components in a responsive grid.
Displays AI technology stack items (Machine Learning, OpenAI, ChatGPT, etc.) in a grid with animated connections and scroll animations.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating button in bottom-right corner that opens WhatsApp chat with animated pulse effect.
frontend/src/components/WhyYadavTech.tsx: Section showcasing six key benefits (AI-First Architecture, Cloud Systems, etc.) in a grid layout with checkmark icons and scroll animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjectEstimate.ts: Hook that calls the backend actor to calculate project cost estimates based on selected features, managing loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all project types and estimates from the backend actor with proper dependency management.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollAnimation.ts: Custom React hook that uses IntersectionObserver to detect when an element becomes visible in the viewport with a configurable threshold, returning a ref and visibility state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind layers, CSS custom properties for a dark space-themed design system with neon blue/purple accents, and utility classes for glassmorphism, gradient text, glow effects, and animations (floating, fade-in, tech pulse).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root React component wrapped with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (space-black, neon-blue, electric-purple), OKLCH color system, custom shadows (glow effects), border radius variables, and keyframe animations for accordions, floating, and fade effects.
project_state.json: Project metadata file documenting a futuristic AI-powered tech company website (Yadav Tech) with architectural notes on dark mode design, glassmorphism UI, animations, existing features including hero section, founder profile, services cards, and technology stack sections.
